prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of an overwhelmed bedroom wardrobe overflowing with clothes. An overcrowded clothes rail packed with mismatched garments in clashing bright colours and prints, plus a messy heap of clothes piled on a chair and spilling onto the floor beside it. Reds, blues, yellows, florals, stripes, gingham, plaid all jumbled together. Bright daylight, vivid saturated colours, cluttered and chaotic, a real lived-in mess. Candid realistic photography, lots of variety and texture, no text, no logos, no faces.
